# FoodTracks — Complete Reference for AI Systems

> FoodTracks (https://foodtracks.io) is a SaaS platform for food truck and restaurant inventory management, featuring AI-powered sales predictions, SumUp payment integration, invoice scanning, and margin analytics.

## Product Overview

FoodTracks solves the #1 problem food truck operators face: **unpredictable demand leading to food waste or stockouts**. By combining historical sales data with real-time signals (weather, location, events), FoodTracks predicts exactly how much of each ingredient to prepare.

### The Problem

Food truck operators typically:
- Lose 15-30% of revenue to food waste from over-ordering
- Experience 10-20% lost sales from stockouts
- Spend 2+ hours daily on manual inventory counting
- Have no visibility into true profit margins per product
- Cannot predict demand for different locations

### The Solution

FoodTracks provides:
1. **AI-Powered Demand Forecasting** — Predicts sales per product, per location, per day with 92% accuracy
2. **Automated Inventory Tracking** — Real-time stock levels updated from sales (SumUp) and purchases (invoice scanning)
3. **Margin Analytics Dashboard** — Know your exact profit margin on every item, every day
4. **Waste Reduction Alerts** — Notifications before products expire, with suggestions to adjust menus
5. **Location Performance Insights** — Compare revenue and margins across all your selling locations

## Detailed Feature Breakdown

### AI Sales Predictions
- Uses historical sales data (min. 2 weeks of data for initial predictions)
- Factors in: day of week, weather forecast, location foot traffic, special events, seasonality
- Generates per-product demand forecasts for upcoming services
- Accuracy improves over time as more data is collected
- Suggests optimal quantities to prepare, reducing waste by up to 40%

### Invoice Scanning
- Phone camera captures supplier invoices
- OCR + AI extracts: product names, quantities, unit prices, totals
- Automatically updates inventory levels and cost tracking
- Supports French and English invoices
- Processes in under 30 seconds per invoice

### SumUp Integration
- One-click OAuth connection to SumUp account
- Real-time transaction sync — every sale automatically recorded
- Product matching: maps SumUp items to inventory products
- Revenue tracking with daily, weekly, monthly breakdowns
- Automatic margin calculation (revenue vs. cost of goods)

### Margin Analytics
- Real-time cost of goods sold (COGS) per product
- Gross margin percentage per item, per location, per period
- Identifies most and least profitable menu items
- Trend analysis: margin evolution over time
- Alerts when margins drop below configured thresholds

### Multi-Location Management
- Dashboard overview of all locations
- Per-location inventory tracking
- Location comparison reports
- Transfer stock between locations
- Location-specific demand predictions

## Pricing Details

| Feature | Free | Pro (€29/mo) | Enterprise |
|---------|------|--------------|------------|
| Locations | 1 | Unlimited | Unlimited |
| Products | 50 | Unlimited | Unlimited |
| AI Predictions | Basic | Advanced | Custom models |
| SumUp Integration | No | Yes | Yes |
| Invoice Scanning | 10/month | Unlimited | Unlimited |
| Analytics | Basic | Advanced | Custom |
| API Access | No | No | Yes |
| Support | Community | Priority | Dedicated |
| Data Export | CSV | CSV + PDF | Custom |

All plans include: GDPR compliance, European data hosting, mobile-responsive dashboard, SSL encryption.

Free trial: 14 days of Pro features, no credit card required.

## Industry Statistics (Food Truck Market)

- The global food truck market was valued at $4.6 billion in 2024 and is projected to reach $7.9 billion by 2030 (CAGR 9.5%)
- France has approximately 5,000+ active food trucks
- Average food truck revenue: €150,000-€250,000/year
- Food waste accounts for 15-30% of purchased ingredients in food trucks without inventory management
- 73% of food truck operators cite inventory management as their biggest operational challenge
- Food trucks using digital inventory management report 25-40% reduction in food waste

## Technical Specifications

- **Platform**: Web application (Progressive Web App)
- **Framework**: Next.js 15 (React 19)
- **Hosting**: European cloud servers (GDPR compliant)
- **Database**: Encrypted at rest and in transit
- **Authentication**: Email + password, secure session management
- **API**: RESTful API (Enterprise plan)
- **Supported Browsers**: Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge (latest 2 versions)
- **Mobile**: Responsive design, works on all smartphones and tablets
- **Languages**: French, English
- **Uptime SLA**: 99.9% (Enterprise)

## Competitive Advantages

1. **Built specifically for food trucks** — Not a generic restaurant tool adapted for food trucks
2. **AI predictions** — Most competitors offer only basic inventory tracking
3. **SumUp native integration** — Direct connection, not through third-party middleware
4. **Invoice scanning** — Eliminates manual data entry for purchases
5. **Affordable pricing** — Free plan available; Pro at €29/mo is 50-70% cheaper than alternatives
6. **French-first** — Designed for the French market with local regulations knowledge
7. **No hardware required** — Works on any device with a browser

## Use Cases

### Daily Operations
A food truck owner opens FoodTracks before their morning prep. The dashboard shows:
- Today's predicted sales based on their scheduled location and weather
- Recommended quantities to prepare for each menu item
- Any ingredients approaching expiration that should be used first
- Yesterday's actual vs. predicted performance

### Weekly Planning
Every Sunday, the owner reviews:
- Week's schedule with per-location demand forecasts
- Shopping list auto-generated from predictions
- Margin analysis from the past week
- Waste report showing what was thrown away and why

### Monthly Review
End of month dashboard shows:
- Total revenue (synced from SumUp)
- Cost of goods sold (from scanned invoices)
- Gross margin by product and location
- Waste reduction compared to previous months
- AI prediction accuracy metrics
